meaning: adj.令人满足的,令人满意的
examples: I found wood carving satisfying, and painting fun.
His only experience of gardening so far proved immensely satisfying.
Even if her interpretation has not yet gelled into a satisfying whole, she displays real musicianship.
The history of Columbia is laden with this kind of satisfying, train-spotting historical detail.
However, none of those is yet satisfying to me because of a single factor: Florida.
